meta.title: Bacillus galactophilus Is a Later Subjective Synonym of Bacillus agri
meta.section: ORIGINAL PAPERS RELATING TO SYSTEMATIC BACTERIOLOGY

abstractHtml: We confirm that Bacillus galactophilus Takagi, Shida, Kadowaki, Komagata, and Udaka 1993 is a later subjective synonym of Bacillus agri Nakamura 1993 on the basis of chemosystematic data and DNA relatedness data.
correspHtml: • *↵ Corresponding author. Mailing address: Research Laboratory, Higeta Shoyu, Co., Ltd., 2-8 Chuo-cho, Choshi, Chiba 288, Japan. Phone: +81-479-22-1180. Fax: +81-479-24-3422.
